material.notes: This SAM inherited the IMPORT SHOP, but can't remember Chester.

timber.leaf:
i was going to the bathroom, downstairs, k street-
spider drops on my lap-
big, thick, black. same spider i reported before, even tho i swore i put him outside-
anyways, i panicked and stood up, still peeing mind you, and threw off my pants-
he vanished somewhere-
remember when you told me i should notice the notable spiders?-
i'd say that was notable
